claims.claim: monday.com's GraphQL API endpoint is https://api.monday.com/v2 and uses an Authorization header with the API token.
monday.com versions its API by month. The 2026-04 version is the current default; 2026-07 is in release candidate and becomes default on 2026-07-01, at which point 2026-04 enters maintenance.
API versions 2024-10 and 2025-01 were deprecated on 2026-02-15.

Per-user complexity budget is 10,000,000 points/minute on paid plans (1,000,000 for trial/free), and a single query cannot exceed 5,000,000 points; read remaining budget via the complexity field, and a 429 returns Retry-After.
monday.com exposes a GraphQL API; the introduction page documents query structure and operations.
Item queries use items_page with cursor-based pagination; items_page_by_column_values replaced the removed items_by_column_values.
Custom automation triggers and actions are built via the monday apps framework; there is no queryable core-API automations endpoint.
The official monday.com MCP server is at github.com/mondaycom/mcp, npm package @mondaydotcomorg/monday-api-mcp, with static CRUD tools plus a Dynamic API Tools beta.
In Israel, Pesach 2026 has Yom Tov on 2 April and 8 April with chol hamoed 3-7 April; 9 April is a regular workday (Diaspora-only second Yom Tov).
example.com is the RFC 2606 reserved domain used here only for illustrative placeholders (https://example.com and https://example.com/webhook/monday).
